nasb.text: Whatever you do in word or deed, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks through Him to God the Father.

esv.text: And whatever you do, in word or deed, do everything in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through him.

cnv.text: 凡你們所作的，無論是言語或行為，都要奉主耶穌的名，藉著他感謝父　神。

ccb.text: 你们无论做什么事、说什么话，都要奉主耶稣的名而行，并借着祂感谢父上帝。

csbs.text: 你们无论做什么，或在言语上或在行为上，都要奉主耶稣的名，藉着他感谢父神。
